# steel-analyzer-automation

Automated steel structure analysis pipeline. Accepts raw project files from Google Drive, runs Gemini-based extraction, generates Excel workbooks, performs Claude QA review, and uploads verified artifacts back to Drive.

## Stack

- Runtime: Node.js (ESM, `"type": "module"`)
- Key libraries: `exceljs ^4.4.0`, `googleapis ^171.4.0`
- No n8n in this pipeline

## Architecture

```
Telegram bot trigger
  → steel-orchestrator.mjs (file-bus watcher, PM2)
    → steel-drive.mjs download (User OAuth, MD5-verified)
    → Gemini CLI (extraction)
    → workbook-generator.mjs (JSON → 3 xlsx)
    → artifact-verifier.mjs (output check)
    → Claude QA review
    → CodexClaw integration
    → steel-drive.mjs upload (owner-approval gate required)
```

## Key Commands

```bash
# Run tests
cd agent-core && npm test

# Drive operations
node agent-core/scripts/steel-drive.mjs list --run <id> --folder <folder_id>
node agent-core/scripts/steel-drive.mjs download --run <id> --folder <folder_id>
node agent-core/scripts/steel-drive.mjs upload --run <id> --folder <folder_id> \
  --file <path> --owner-approval "I_APPROVE_STEEL_UPLOAD:<run_id>:<folder_id>"

# Orchestrator
node agent-core/scripts/steel-orchestrator.mjs
node agent-core/scripts/steel-orchestrator.mjs status
node agent-core/scripts/steel-orchestrator.mjs init <run_id> <project_name> <delivery_mode>
```

## File Map

```
agent-core/
  package.json                        npm root (steel-agent-core)
  scripts/
    steel-drive.mjs                   Drive wrapper (799 lines)
    steel-orchestrator.mjs            File-bus watcher (843 lines)
  src/
    workbook-generator.mjs            JSON → xlsx via ExcelJS (341 lines)
    artifact-verifier.mjs             Output directory checker (60 lines)
  steel-bus/
    lib/state-machine.mjs             Pure state machine, 17 states
    lib/gepa-register.mjs             GEPA proposal tracking
    inbox/                            Signal drop zone (runtime)
    runs/                             Per-run state dirs (runtime, not committed)
    dead-letter/                      Failed signal archive (runtime)
  schemas/                            JSON schemas for all bus signals
  test/                               *.test.mjs test suite
docs/
  superflow/specs/                    Feature specs
  superflow/plans/                    Sprint plans
  handoffs/                           Cross-runtime handoff notes
  operations/                         Runbooks
```

## State Machine States

`requested` → `sources_manifested` → `sources_downloaded` → `extraction_done` → `workbooks_generated` → `workbooks_validated` → `producer_handoff_done` → `claude_review_requested` → `claude_review_passed` | `claude_review_blocked` → `codex_integration_requested` → `codex_integration_done` → `gepa_proposed` → `gepa_reviewed` → `upload_ready` → `uploaded_verified` → `closed` | `dead_letter`

<!-- updated-by-superflow:2026-05-24 -->
